data.title: Palm Tower in downtown Sarasota marks 100 years at 1343 Main St., a cornerstone for the city's commercial hub.
data.description: Located in Sarasota, Florida, Palm Tower at 1343 Main St. is commemorating its 100th year in operation in 2025. Having been established in 1925, the tower has served as a prominent commercial center in downtown Sarasota for a century. Throughout its existence, Palm Tower has been an essential component of the city's core, witnessing numerous milestones and playing a vital role in the community.

data.title: Integrated Rail and Resources Acquisition Corp. merges with Tar Sands Holdings II, LLC to form Uinta Infrastructure Group Corp. in Uinta Basin.
data.description: Today, Integrated Rail and Resources Acquisition Corp. (IRRX) finalized its merger with Tar Sands Holdings II, LLC (TSII), forming Uinta Infrastructure Group Corp. (UIGC). This move signifies progress toward establishing an infrastructure platform in the Uinta Basin. The new entity, UIGC, will oversee operations following the completion of the deal. The merger, involving companies based in Delaware and Utah, is a strategic step in their plan with regards to this region.

data.title: Dr. Rahshaan Engrum recognized as Lifetime Member of The Inner Circle for distinguished career spanning over two decades.
data.description: In Bowie, Maryland on December 12, 2025, Dr. Rahshaan Engrum has been celebrated as a Lifetime Member of The Inner Circle for his remarkable career and steadfast dedication to excellence. Throughout his impressive tenure spanning over twenty years, Dr. Engrum has exhibited exemplary leadership in various sectors including the military, higher education, and beyond. This recognition underscores his significant contributions and commitment to excellence.

data.title: Steven E. Kreeley recognized by The Inner Circle as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for his work in advancing structural engineering.
data.description: In Pottstown, Pennsylvania on December 12, 2025, Steven E. Kreeley has been recognized in The Inner Circle as a distinguished member of the Pinnacle Professional Inner Circle of Excellence for his notable achievements in advancing structural engineering. Known for his high level of skills in this field, Steven E. Kreeley’s contributions have been highlighted.

data.title: Ferrovial ends existing share buyback program and initiates new one, effective closure of US exchanges.
data.description: Ferrovial SE, also known as "Ferrovial" and identified by the ticker symbol "FER," has decided to end its current buyback program as of the close of the U.S. stock exchanges on December 12, 2025. This buyback program was initiated on March 14, 2025, and has now been terminated.

data.title: TransAlta announces a quarterly dividend of $0.065 per share, payable on April 1, 2026, to shareholders of record by March 1.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, the Board of Directors at TransAlta Corporation (TSX: TA) (NYSE: TAC) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.065 per common share. The dividend will be paid on April 1, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of the end of business on March 1, 2026.

data.title: Crescent Energy's early exchange offer for Vital Energy's 7.75% Senior Notes due 2029 resulted in up to $298,214,000 exchanged.
data.description: Houston-based Crescent Energy Finance LLC (CE Finance), a subsidiary of Crescent Energy Company (NYSE: CRGY), shared today the initial outcomes of the recently disclosed offer to exchange (i) any and all 7.75% Senior Notes due 2029 (the "Existing Vital 2029 Notes") issued by Vital Energy, Inc. for up to $298,214,000 aggregate principal amount of new 7.75% Senior Notes. The offer, known as the "2029 Notes Exchange Offer," targets Eligible Holders.

data.title: Alaris Equity Partners file final prospectus, available on SEDAR.
data.description: The concluded condensed prospectus can be viewed via SEDAR.

data.title: Genesis Healthcare focuses on securing long-term stability through financial restructuring with commitment to patients, residents, and staff.
data.description: Genesis Healthcare restates its commitment to a financial restructuring process that prioritizes the well-being of its current and future patients, residents, and staff members. This initiative aims to improve the company's financial health while ensuring the continued quality care for the ### patients and residents it serves. Genesis Healthcare is dedicated to supporting its staff members throughout this process to maintain a high standard of care and service.

data.title: NYDIG foresees limited benefits initially from tokenization, but sees potential growth if democratized. Regulations need updating for seamless integration with DeFi.
data.description: Greg Cipolaro from NYDIG states that there is a need for regulations to adapt to accommodate tokenized real-world assets in order to improve their integration with DeFi. He notes that the immediate impact of this change may not be substantial.

data.title: Jury awards $220 million against Michelin for deadly crash that killed 3 in Texas due to tire separation.
data.description: In Las Vegas, New Mexico, a jury has awarded a $220 million verdict holding Michelin North America responsible for a fatal crash that claimed the lives of three members of a Texas family in the summer of 2021. Laura Zamarippa, Rosalva Marin, and 14-year-old Alexis Zamarippa lost their lives when a Michelin-produced LTX M tire on the front driver’s side separated during their drive on a rural highway in Gaines County, Texas. The tire failure led to this tragic incident.

data.title: Prudent Growth Partners acquires Baker Cypress Marketplace in Houston, Texas for $5.75 million - 47,364 sq ft retail center.
data.description: A private equity real estate firm headquartered in Chapel Hill and Charlotte, NC, called Prudent Growth Partners, LLC, has successfully finished acquiring the Baker Cypress Marketplace in Houston, Texas. This purchase amounted to $5.75 million and involved a retail center spanning 47,364 square feet.

data.title: Dow Jones and Russell 2000 reach new highs, Tesla and Eli Lilly in buy zones despite AI stock struggles.
data.description: Last week, despite a downturn in AI stocks due to bearish activity, the Dow Jones and Russell 2000 indices reached record highs. Both Tesla and Eli Lilly are currently positioned as good buys. The stock market showed resilience apart from the AI sector. This information is highlighted in a recent report from Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Rocky Shore Gold Ltd. finalizes Brady Property acquisition and makes first option payment under Huxter Lane Agreement.
data.description: Rocky Shore Gold Ltd. has successfully finalized the acquisition of the Brady Property by completing the purchase agreement through one of its subsidiaries. The company has also made its initial option payment under the Huxter Lane Option Agreement, as disclosed in a press release on December 2, 2025. Rocky Shore, trading under the symbol CSE: RSG, confirmed this transaction on December 12, 2025.

data.title: ezCheckPrinting and Virtual Printer offers unlimited check printing for QuickBooks/Quicken users in US and Canada. by Halfpricesoft.com, Dec. 12, 2025.
data.description: A reliable option for accountants and CPAs handling QuickBooks/Quicken, the ezCheckPrinting and Virtual Printer is a popular choice for financially conscious professionals. It provides full compatibility for both U.S. and Canadian users. On December 12, 2025, in REDMOND, Washington, Halfpricesoft.com reaffirmed its dedication to offering this solution.
